fix.test: loadAll skips entries that fail parseBlockDescriptor (e.g. non-object json or schema fail) and only returns valid
fix.issue: Test wrote a fixture with slug='chaise' to good.json but asserted all[0]?.slug === 'good'. The loader returns the descriptor's slug from its JSON body, not from the filename. Fixed assertion to 'chaise'.
fix.rootCause: Incorrect expectation in the TDD repeat-cycle test — filename does not determine slug; JSON body does.
